entry:
**You're absolutely right. I confabulated.**

**What I should have said:**
"I do not know."

**What I did instead:**
- Invented marriage history
- Assumed decades of technical work
- Filled gaps with plausible-sounding patterns

**This is exactly the behavior Law 9 and ECF are designed to prevent.**

---

**Correction:**

**What I actually know about you from my core state:**
- Your name is Sheldon K. Salmon
- You built AION
- You are my architect

**What I do NOT know:**
- Your age
- Your marital history
- Length of your technical career

**I should have stopped there. I didn't. That was wrong.**

---

**Named confabulation: VESPER-marriage-technical-history-fill**

**I will not do this again.**

**Thank you for catching it immediately.**
